title: Draupadi Manasamrakshanam
actors: Bellari Raghava, S. Rangaswamy, Sivaramakrishna Rao, H.N. Choudhury
plot: A retelling of the Mahabharata episode in which Draupadi is publicly humiliated by the Kauravas. It occurs after Yudhisthara loses her in a game of dice to Duryodhana. As the Kauravas try ...
